title: Create Loading Screen Tips
description: A resource pack for UltrusBot's Loading Screen Tips mod, which adds create-specific tips
body:
# Create Tips
This resource pack adds 40 new create-related loading screen tips to [UltrusBot's](https://modrinth.com/user/UltrusBot) [Loading Screen Tips mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/loadingscreentips). This resource pack is especially usedul for beginners. UltrusBot's mod is required as it implements the rendering of the tips.
